source_pr.title: plan: copy the physical info to avoid panic.
source_pr.body:
When we get a physical info from memory table, we shouldn't change it directly. We should always copy it firstly.
@shenli @coocood @winoros @lamxTyler PTAL

symptoms: result = tk.MustQuery("select * from t1 , t2 where t2.c1 = t1.c1 and t2.c2 = 0 and t1.c1 = 1 order by t1.c2 limit 1") (executor/join_test.go)
failure_signature: result = tk.MustQuery("select * from t1 , t2 where t2.c1 = t1.c1 and t2.c2 = 0 and t1.c1 = 1 order by t1.c2 limit 1") (executor/join_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: result = tk.MustQuery("select * from t1 , t2 where t2.c1 = t1.c1 and t2.c2 = 0 and t1.c1 = 1 order by t1.c2 limit 1") (executor/join_test.go)
